description: psutil is a cross-platform library for retrieving information on running processes and system utilization.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/psutil && python3 psutil.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/psutil && python3 psutil.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/psutil && python3 psutil.py --help`. Process and system monitoring.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: Process and system monitoring.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Process and system monitoring.
